Line 112:          border: 1px solid black;
Line 113:          font-size: 12px;
Line 114:      }
Line 115:  
Line 116:      table th {
Line 117:          border: 1px solid black;
Line 118:          font-size: 12px;
Line 119:          text-align: right;
Line 120:          padding-right: 0;
Line 121:      }
Line 122:  
Line 123:      table.PartnerTypes td.AlgnRight {
Line 124:          text-align: right;
Line 125:          color: darkblue;
Line 126:          padding-right: 0;
Line 127:      }
Line 128:  
Line 129:      table.TestTable th {
Line 130:          border: 1px solid black;
Line 131:          font-size: 12px;
Line 132:          text-align: center;
Line 133:          padding-right: 0;
Line 134:      }
Line 135:  
Line 136:      table.TestTable td.AlgnRight {
Line 137:          text-align: right;
Line 138:          color: darkblue;
Line 139:          padding-right: 0;
Line 140:          width: 30px;
Line 141:          font-weight: bold;
Line 142:      }
Line 143:  </style>
Line 144:
